---
title: "seq_throughput"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
cum_ela <- ligase_ela %>% select(c(start_time,duration, passes_filtering, sequence_length_template))
sampl_id = first(ligase_ela$sample_id)
pass_cum_ela <- cum_ela %>% filter(passes_filtering==TRUE)
fail_cum_ela <- cum_ela %>% filter(passes_filtering==FALSE)
```



```{r}
#df %>% mutate(sales_tax = price * 0.075)
pass_cum_ela %>% mutate(duration = duration/3600)
fail_cum_ela %>% mutate(duration = duration/3600)
```

#seconds to hours
```{r}



sec_to_h <- function(my_data){
  mutate my_data$duration = my_data$duration / 3600
  my_data$start_time = my_data$start_time
  my_data$passes_filtering = my_data$passes_filtering 
  my_data$sequence_length_template = my_data$sequence_length_template
}

hpass_cum_ela <- sec_to_h(pass_cum_ela)

```


#1 Gigabase (Gb): 1,000,000,000 bases.
```{r}





```


```{r}

```


```{r}

```
